description: Ion MRegExpMatcher recovery bug - MRegExpMatcher in js/src/jit/MIROps.yaml was marked can_recover even though bailout recovery invokes RRegExpMatcher::recover in js/src/jit/Recover.cpp, which calls RegExpMatcherRaw and can trigger GC while cx->suppressGC is set. The debug/ASAN crash is a suppressed-GC assertion during interpreter regexp matching; in release builds, running GC-triggering code during bailout recovery can corrupt memory. The PoC forces Ion compilation and bailout through regexp matching. The fix removes can_recover from MRegExpMatcher and deletes the RRegExpMatcher recovery instruction from Recover.cpp and Recover.h.
